verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a little life inside the seed of God, And in the Son, it will spring up from the sod; It is the rising of the Son, And I can feel His power to press on.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the Son shine down on me, 'Til the radiance of Your Word, in me, I see. In Your light, all darkness flees, Let the Son shine down on me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the presence of the Son of Man We can grow i n the image of I AM. There'll be light about the evening time, Calling, "Bride, come up hither, RISE AND SHINE."
